mapper.update: UPDATE social.carbon_market_sync_state SET last_success_at = #{lastSuccessAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE}, last_trade_date = #{lastTradeDate, jdbcType=DATE}, last_quote_time = #{lastQuoteTime, jdbcType=TIME}, last_error = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP_WITH_TIMEZONE} WHERE id = #{id}
